# llms.txt
# Machine-readable index for AI agents entering this repository.
# Format: key: value pairs, one per line. Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored.
# Spec reference: https://llmstxt.org

project: agents
description: AI agent standards template — global rules, model shims, and an init skill that scaffolds .ai/ + AGENTS.md + llms.txt into any target repo.
language: Markdown
framework: n/a (template repo)
runtime: n/a

# --- Agent Instructions ---

# Folder is `ai/` here (Obsidian-compatible). Standard convention is `.ai/` — rename
# on deploy. See ai/README.md "Deployment" for the one-line git mv.
system-prompt-dir: ai/
global-rules: ai/global_core.md
project-context: ai/project_context.md     # dogfooded for this repo; the skill generates this per target repo
shim-claude: ai/shims/claude.md
shim-openai: ai/shims/openai.md
shim-gemini: ai/shims/gemini.md
shim-copilot: ai/shims/copilot.md
shim-cursor: ai/shims/cursor.md
shim-windsurf: ai/shims/windsurf.md
assembly-order: shim + global_core + project_context

# --- Key Locations ---

skill-entry: ai/SKILL.md
skill-implementation: ai/SKILL-implementation.md
templates: ai/project_context.template.md, ai/llms-template.txt
docs: ai/README.md

# --- Do Not Modify ---

do-not-touch: ai/global_core.md (universal rules — change with care), ai/shims/*.md (model contracts)

# --- Secrets Policy ---

secrets-policy: This repo holds no secrets. Templates reference env var NAMES only — never values.
agent-no-read: .env, .env.*, .envrc, .dev.vars*, secrets.*, *.pem, *.key, *.p12, *.pfx, id_rsa*, .npmrc, .pypirc, ~/.aws/credentials, ~/.config/gcloud/, gha-creds-*.json, .terraformrc
